_meta.description: EROAD product domain map for agent traversal. Use capability_systems[key] to look up any system, dependency_graph[key].upstream / .downstream to find impact, platform_map to filter by platform, team_map to find owners.
_meta.agent_usage: When given a Jira ticket: 1) extract affected product/service name, 2) find matching system key in capability_systems, 3) traverse dependency_graph to identify upstream (what feeds it) and downstream (what it feeds), 4) identify platforms, 5) determine test scope from impact_matrix.

domains.name: Safety
domains.description: Prevents incidents, detects unsafe conditions, and supports coaching of driver behaviour.

domains.name: Compliance
domains.description: Regulatory obligations for fleet operators across hours of service, fatigue, dispatch, and vehicle inspection.

domains.name: Tax
domains.description: Road user charging, fuel tax, and weight/distance tax obligations across NZ, AU, and NA.

domains.name: Cold Chain
domains.description: Temperature-monitored transport compliance and refrigerated fleet management.

domains.name: Geospatial
domains.description: Spatial intelligence, location enrichment, geofencing, and navigation.

domains.name: Fleet Intelligence
domains.description: Analytics and health intelligence layer for fleet operations — utilisation, fuel economy, sustainability, emissions, vehicle maintenance.

domains.name: Customer
domains.description: The legal entity, organisation, and account relationship — who is the customer.

domains.name: Person
domains.description: The individual — drivers, employees, and operatives within the fleet.

domains.name: Asset
domains.description: The physical asset — vehicles, trailers, and equipment.

domains.name: Identity
domains.description: Authentication and access control — who is allowed in and what they can do.

domains.name: Entitlements and Associations
domains.description: What each customer is permitted to access, and associations between entities.

domains.name: Notification
domains.description: Outbound communications from the platform to users, drivers, and external systems.

domains.name: Device and Connectivity
domains.description: Full hardware-to-platform connectivity pipeline: physical device through telemetry ingestion to normalised event data.

domains.name: Data and Integration
domains.description: Customer data access, data sharing pipelines, partner integrations, and analytics data infrastructure.

domains.name: Platform
domains.description: Cloud infrastructure, developer tooling, and operations support.

dependency_graph._note: upstream = what this system depends on (feeds INTO this system). downstream = what this system feeds into (affected when this changes).

impact_matrix._note: When a Jira ticket touches system X, these are the additional areas that should be considered for regression testing.

device_connectivity-ingestion-myeroad_pi.rationale: Foundation of all MyEROAD product data. Any change here can break ALL MyEROAD features that consume telematics.

device_connectivity-ingestion-360_pipeli.rationale: Foundation of all Coretex 360 product data.

identity-auth-sso_mfa.rationale: Auth is a prerequisite for all products. Any change breaks login across all platforms.

person-driver-mgmt_v1.rationale: Driver entity is consumed by ELD, HOS, safety scoring, DVIR, and mobile Drive app.

person-driver-mgmt_v2.rationale: Replacement for V1 on MyEROAD. Changes affect ELD and driver safety products.

asset-vehicle-vehicle_mgmt.rationale: Vehicle entity consumed by ELD, DVIR, reefer, fleet intel, and RUC.

geospatial-geocoding-geo_v1.rationale: Provides location context to most MyEROAD products. Overspeed, reports, fleet intel all depend on it.

geospatial-geocoding-geo_v3.rationale: Replacing V1 — parallel rollout means regressions in both must be caught.

geospatial-geofencing-backend.rationale: Entry/exit detection feeds notifications, fleet reporting, and tax (off-road detection).

compliance-eld-myeroad.rationale: FMCSA regulated. Changes require thorough ELD compliance testing per ELD rule.

notification-outbound-alerts.rationale: Cross-cutting — consumed by safety, reefer, and geofence alerts.

platform-developer-driver_mobile.rationale: Mobile shell used by Drive app — changes affect ELD, DVIR, fatigue, messaging.

device_connectivity-ingestion-consolidat.rationale: Nightly aggregation feeds all MyEROAD reports and tax products. Silent failures hard to detect.

data_integration-operational-360_databas.rationale: Underpins all 360 reporting, EDC, and analytics. Schema changes cascade broadly.

safety-video-clarity_edge.rationale: Feeds replay, fatigue monitoring, seat shaker. API changes affect dashcam replay service.

cold_chain-reefer-management.rationale: Primary reefer view depends on ingestion pipeline and OEM integrations.

search_aliases._note: Use these to map common Jira terms/labels to system keys when ticket text is ambiguous.
